Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AS1CANMv5

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 00
Recv ID: 00
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: FF
Func Name: CAN2

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "sentbytes": "05EB",
    "name": "Audio_Info",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "CurrentAudioSourceV2": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentRadioBand": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentRadioMode": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentRadioPreset": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentAudioStatus": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentPhoneStatus": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CurrentAudioTrackNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "0734",
    "name": "BIC_to_DTOOL",
